what is inception ?
Inception is a highly acclaimed science fiction action film directed by Christopher Nolan. It's known for its complex plot about a team of thieves who enter people's dreams to steal or plant ideas.
inception in python

That's an interesting question! While the movie 'Inception' isn't a Python concept itself, the idea of nested layers, similar to dreams within dreams, is often represented in programming using **recursion**, where a function calls itself.

what is your policy?

Our FAILED DELIVERY POLICY states that if delivery fails twice, your order returns to our warehouse. We will contact you within 2 business days to reschedule, and a re-delivery charge of Rs. 100 will apply.

sources.text:
WHAT TO DO IF YOUR ORDER IS LATE:
- Check your tracking number via SMS or email confirmation
- Allow 1 extra business day before contacting support
- Contact us at support@fastdelivery.pk or call 0800-FAST
- Provide your order number for fastest resolution
TRACKING YOUR ORDER
You will receive an SMS with a tracking link within 24 hours of dispatch.
Track live at: www.fastdelivery.pk/track
Courier partners: TCS, Leopards, M&P, Trax
FAILED DELIVERY POLICY
If delivery fails twice, your order returns to our warehouse.
We will contact you within 2 business days to reschedule.
Re-delivery charge: Rs. 100
DAMAGED OR WRONG ITEM RECEIVED
Report within 24 hours of delivery with photo evidence.
Email: complaints@fastdelivery.pk
Replacement dispatched within 2-3 business days.

sources.text:
photograph. All such information is stored or used for processing  orders and under no 
circumstance are any of these details made available in the public domain. We may use this 
information to send you further information regarding our services.

FAST DELIVERY CO. — FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: How do I place an order?
A: Browse our website, add items to cart, proceed to checkout, enter your delivery address and
payment details, and confirm your order. You will receive an email and SMS confirmation immediately.
Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept JazzCash, EasyPaisa, credit/debit cards (Visa/Mastercard), bank transfer, and Cash on
Delivery (COD) for orders up to Rs. 10,000.
Q: Is Cash on Delivery available?
A: Yes, COD is available for orders up to Rs. 10,000 across Pakistan. COD orders may take 1 extra
business day to process.
Q: My payment failed but amount was deducted. What do I do?
A: This is a temporary hold by your bank. The amount is automatically reversed within 3-5 business
days. If not reversed, contact your bank with the transaction reference number.
Q: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
A: Address changes are possible within 2 hours of ordering. Contact us immediately at 0800-FAST.

WHAT TO DO IF YOUR ORDER IS LATE:
- Check your tracking number via SMS or email confirmation
- Allow 1 extra business day before contacting support
- Contact us at support@fastdelivery.pk or call 0800-FAST
- Provide your order number for fastest resolution
TRACKING YOUR ORDER
You will receive an SMS with a tracking link within 24 hours of dispatch.
Track live at: www.fastdelivery.pk/track
Courier partners: TCS, Leopards, M&P, Trax
FAILED DELIVERY POLICY
If delivery fails twice, your order returns to our warehouse.
We will contact you within 2 business days to reschedule.
Re-delivery charge: Rs. 100
DAMAGED OR WRONG ITEM RECEIVED
Report within 24 hours of delivery with photo evidence.
Email: complaints@fastdelivery.pk
Replacement dispatched within 2-3 business days.
